title: Shader Panorama
description: The Minecraft 1.20 Cherry Grove menu background — but with shaders.
body:
This resource pack replaces the default main menu panorama with a higher-quality version of
the Minecraft 1.20 Cherry Grove background.

The images are the same scene used in the original 1.20 menu, but they were captured using
Photon Shaders to create better lighting, shadows, and atmosphere.

Features

🌸 Cherry Grove panorama from Minecraft 1.20

✨ Captured using Photon Shaders

🖼 4K resolution images (2160 × 2160)

🎮 Works as a drop-in replacement for the default menu background

What this pack changes

This pack only replaces the main menu background images.
No other textures or game elements are modified.

If you like the original Cherry Grove menu but want it to look more cinematic and vibrant, this pack is for you.
